FFlagAbuseReportMenuScreenshotReduceMoti.mechanism: Reduces motion effects in the abuse report menu for smoother screenshots.
FFlagAbuseReportMenuScreenshotReduceMoti.purpose: Helps players take clearer screenshots without distracting animations.

FFlagAndroidHevcEncoderCheck.mechanism: Checks if the Android device supports HEVC encoding for better video quality.
FFlagAndroidHevcEncoderCheck.purpose: Improves video playback quality for players on compatible Android devices.

FFlagFoundationRemoveDividerSegmentedCon.mechanism: Removes visual dividers in segmented controls for a cleaner interface.
FFlagFoundationRemoveDividerSegmentedCon.purpose: Enhances the user interface for a more streamlined and modern look.

FFlagAdjustAudioLoaderThreadCount_Staged.mechanism: Adjusts the number of threads used for loading audio files.
FFlagAdjustAudioLoaderThreadCount_Staged.purpose: Improves audio loading times and performance for a better gaming experience.
